name: Dark Necromancer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大屍教</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダーク・ビショップ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Fiend or Zombie Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your banished Level 4 or lower Fiend or Zombie monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Dark Necromancer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Fiend or Zombie Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your banished Level 4 or lower Fiend or Zombie monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Dark Necromancer" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Fiend or Zombie Ritual Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your banished Level 4 or lower Fiend or Zombie monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Dark Necromancer" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
